fields.title: Digital Solutions
fields.description: Comprehensive digital transformation services for modern enterprises.
fields.long_description: Our Digital Solutions suite provides end-to-end technology services ranging from web development to cloud infrastructure, designed to scale your business operations effectively.
fields.meta_description: Transform your business with our professional digital solutions including web, mobile, and cloud services.
fields.meta_keywords: digital solutions, web development, mobile apps, it consulting

fields.title: Strategic Planning
fields.description: Developing a roadmap for digital implementation.

fields.title: Development
fields.description: Coding and building the digital asset.

fields.name: Starter Pack
fields.description: Basic digital presence for small businesses.

fields.question: What digital solutions do you offer?
fields.answer: We offer web development, mobile apps, software solutions, cloud hosting, and IT consulting.

fields.question: How long does a typical project take?
fields.answer: Timelines vary from 2 weeks for simple websites to 3-6 months for complex software.

fields.question: Do you provide maintenance?
fields.answer: Yes, we offer ongoing support and maintenance packages for all our digital products.

fields.question: Is custom development available?
fields.answer: Absolutely, we specialize in building custom solutions tailored to specific business needs.

fields.question: Are the prices fixed?
fields.answer: Starting prices are mentioned; final quotes depend on the complexity of your requirements.

fields.title: Website Development
fields.long_description: We build websites that convert visitors into customers using the latest technologies and responsive design principles.
fields.meta_description: Custom website design and development services starting from SAR 599.

fields.question: Is hosting included?
fields.answer: Hosting is separate but we assist with the setup process.

fields.question: Will my site be mobile friendly?
fields.answer: Yes, all our websites are built with a mobile-first responsive approach.

fields.question: Can I update the content myself?
fields.answer: Yes, we integrate easy-to-use CMS platforms like WordPress or custom Dashboards.

fields.question: Do you provide business emails?
fields.answer: Yes, we can help set up G-Suite or professional mail servers.

fields.question: Is the SAR 599 price one-time?
fields.answer: Yes, it is the one-time development fee for the starter package.

fields.title: Mobile App Development
fields.description: Custom mobile application development starting from SAR 1,999.
fields.long_description: We specialize in building high-performance native and cross-platform mobile applications with seamless UI/UX and robust backend integration.
fields.meta_title: Mobile App Development | Android & iOS Solutions
fields.meta_description: Expert mobile app development in UAE. iOS, Android, and Cross-Platform apps starting from SAR 1,999.
fields.meta_keywords: mobile app, android app, ios app, app development

fields.question: Do you develop for both iOS and Android?
fields.answer: Yes, we build native apps for both or use Flutter for cross-platform solutions.

fields.question: Will you upload the app to the store?
fields.answer: Yes, we handle the entire submission process for Apple App Store and Google Play Store.

fields.question: Can I integrate third-party APIs?
fields.answer: Absolutely, we can integrate payments, social logins, maps, and more.

fields.question: Who owns the source code?
fields.answer: The client retains 100% ownership of the source code upon project completion.

fields.question: Do you provide app updates?
fields.answer: Yes, we offer maintenance contracts for regular updates and OS compatibility.

fields.title: Business Software Solutions
fields.description: Optimize operations with custom software starting from SAR 999.
fields.long_description: We build scalable software solutions like ERP, CRM, and Inventory management to automate your business workflows.
fields.meta_description: Custom business software solutions for automation and management starting from SAR 999.
fields.meta_keywords: ERP, CRM, inventory management, custom software

fields.question: Can you customize existing ERPs?
fields.answer: Yes, we can customize and extend platforms like Odoo, SAP, or build from scratch.

fields.question: Is the data secure?
fields.answer: We implement enterprise-grade encryption and multi-factor authentication.

fields.question: Does it support offline use?
fields.answer: Yes, we can build sync-ready desktop applications for offline capabilities.

fields.question: Do you provide staff training?
fields.answer: Yes, on-site and remote training sessions are included in our delivery.

fields.question: Is there a recurring fee?
fields.answer: Unless you opt for a SaaS model, you own the perpetual license for custom builds.

fields.title: Cloud Hosting & DevOps
fields.description: Enterprise-grade cloud setups starting from SAR 99/month.
fields.long_description: We manage your cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and GCP, implementing DevOps best practices for seamless deployment and 99.9% uptime.
fields.meta_title: Cloud Hosting & DevOps | AWS, Azure, GCP Experts
fields.meta_description: Optimize your cloud infrastructure with our DevOps and server management services starting from SAR 99.
fields.meta_keywords: cloud hosting, devops, aws, azure, docker, kubernetes

fields.title: Cloud Assessment
fields.description: Evaluating existing load and choosing the right tier.

fields.question: Which cloud providers do you support?
fields.answer: We support AWS, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), and Microsoft Azure.

fields.question: What is DevOps implementation?
fields.answer: It involves automating your software build, testing, and deployment pipeline for faster releases.

fields.question: Do you offer disaster recovery?
fields.answer: Yes, we set up redundant systems and automated backups to ensure data safety.

fields.question: Is security monitoring included?
fields.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 server monitoring and firewall management.

fields.question: Can you help migrate our current server?
fields.answer: Yes, we provide migration services with zero downtime for most applications.

fields.title: IT Consulting & Support
fields.description: Professional IT consulting and maintenance services starting from SAR 99.
fields.long_description: We provide strategic IT consulting, system integration, and ongoing maintenance to ensure your business technology remains reliable and modern.
fields.meta_title: IT Consulting & Support | UAE Business Tech
fields.meta_description: Strategic technology consulting and system integration services starting from SAR 99.
fields.meta_keywords: it consulting, system integration, tech support, business optimization

fields.title: Discovery & Audit
fields.description: Evaluating existing tech stack and pain points.

fields.question: Do you provide on-site support?
fields.answer: Yes, we offer both remote and on-site IT support across the UAE.

fields.question: Can you help with digital transformation strategy?
fields.answer: Yes, we create long-term roadmaps to modernize your business technology.

fields.question: Do you offer emergency 24/7 support?
fields.answer: Yes, we have priority support packages for mission-critical IT needs.

fields.question: Are you affiliated with specific software vendors?
fields.answer: We are vendor-neutral and recommend solutions that best fit your budget and needs.

fields.question: How do you charge for consulting?
fields.answer: We offer both hourly rates and project-based flat fees.
